column1: # Description: Core OT asset inventory watchlist for Microsoft
#   classification for every OT asset. Referenced by all
#   detection use cases (UC-ICS-001 through UC-ICS-013) for
#   alert enrichment and dynamic severity assignment.
# Usage: Populated through the asset inventory process described
#   in Chapter 6. Maintained as a living document
# OS                 : string  — Operating system (for Windows-based systems)
# ProcessFunction    : string  — Physical process or sub-process supported
# EngineeringOwner   : string  — Responsible engineering team or individual
# EDRDeployed        : bool    — Whether EDR agent is installed
# EDRCapable         : bool    — Whether the device can support EDR
# LastVerified       : date    — Date the entry was last verified accurate

column11: Process data archival - all plant data

column21: Controlled access point for OT remote access
